purpose: Extend plugins/base/commands/next.md Step 4 detail branch and introduce Step 4a (paragraph synthesis). The detail branch collects up to 3 actionable candidates, invokes Step 4a per candidate, renders a structured findings block, and calls AskUserQuestion before delegating to Step 5.

public_api.name: Step 4 detail branch
public_api.signature: mode == 'detail' → render top-3 findings → AskUserQuestion → proceed to Step 5
public_api.description: Consumes the ModeVariable seam (mode='detail'). Collects first 3 actionable findings in document order, synthesises a paragraph per finding via Step 4a, renders the '## Top 3 actionable findings' block, presents AskUserQuestion with Dispatch #1 (always), Dispatch #2 (only when #2 exists), Dispatch #3 (only when #3 exists), Abort (always). On selection continues to Step 5; on Abort exits.

public_api.name: Step 4a: Paragraph Synthesis
public_api.description: Inline lead-agent synthesis routine. Parses anchor from bullet, reads anchor file with bounded window, optionally greps for nearest heading/function, composes a 3-5 sentence what/where/goal paragraph. Falls back to bullet-only composition with '(anchor file missing)' appended on any read failure.

owned_data: mode variable (consumed from Step 0 via ModeVariable seam)
up to 3 actionable finding candidates (document order from Step 3)
dependencies_forbidden: Agent (no subagent spawning per architecture.md Boundary Rule 2)
Skill (not in Step 4a; Step 6 uses Skill for final dispatch only)
external_ports: ModeVariable seam: mode string set by Step 0, consumed by Step 4 branch
test_targets: AC-DETAIL-1: '## Top 3 actionable findings' block with anchor, classification, paragraph per candidate
AC-DETAIL-2: AskUserQuestion with Dispatch #1 (always), #2/#3 (conditional), Abort (always), conditional rule documented
AC-PARA-1: offset = max(1, line - 10), limit = 21 verbatim in Step 4a
AC-PARA-2: '(anchor file missing)' verbatim fallback in Step 4a
AC-PARA-3: 3-5 sentences, what/where/goal three topics in Step 4a
